Flats, Apartments and Houses for Rent in Indiranagar, bangalore

Overview About Rental Properties in Indiranagar for July 2026

Indiranagar is located in bangalore

Indiranagar is a well-established residential neighbourhood in bangalore

You can explore NoBroker verified owner-listed rental homes in Indiranagar along with 1 BHK 37+, 2 BHK 36+, 3 BHK 21+, 1 RK 21+, 4 BHK 5+, 4+ BHK 1+ units to spacious and luxury apartments.

Rental costs in Indiranagar also include maintenance charges and refundable security deposits that vary by property types such as society apartments, independent houses, and standalone buildings.

Society Apartments: Maintenance from ₹387 to ₹12,249 | Deposit from ₹32,600 to ₹2,500,000

Independent Houses: Maintenance from ₹330 to ₹8,499 | Deposit from ₹29,800 to ₹819,999

Standalone Buildings: Deposit from ₹300,000 to ₹300,000

Rent Prices in Indiranagar - What to Expect

Indiranagar is an active residential rental market within bangalore, offering homes across multiple configurations, furnishing types, and budget ranges. Based on recent NoBroker-verified listings and active inventory, rental prices in July 2026 typically range as follows:

1 BHK Flats for Rent in Indiranagar

1 BHK - 300 sq. ft. to 1,600 sq. ft.

Monthly rent generally in Indiranagar falls between ₹9,200 to ₹43,999 per month, with higher values seen in premium blocks and fully furnished homes.

2 BHK Flats for Rent in Indiranagar

2 BHK - 580 sq. ft. to 1,600 sq. ft.

Monthly rent generally in Indiranagar falls between ₹15,000 to ₹75,000 per month, influenced by amenities, water source like corporation / Borewell, or if the apartment is part of societies.

3 BHK Flats for Rent in Indiranagar

3 BHK - 900 sq. ft. to 2,404 sq. ft.

Monthly rent generally in Indiranagar falls between ₹27,750 to ₹160,000 per month, especially in gated communities and prime blocks.

1 RK Flats for Rent in Indiranagar

1 RK - 130 sq. ft. to 600 sq. ft.

Typically 1 RK rent in Indiranagar ranges between ₹7,650 to ₹33,124 per month, depending on which part of Indiranagar you are searching for the property like block, building type or furnishing type.

4 BHK Flats for Rent in Indiranagar

4 BHK - 1,500 sq. ft. to 4,980 sq. ft.

Monthly rent generally in Indiranagar falls between ₹80,000 to ₹250,000 per month, with prices increasing based on layout, furnishing, and exclusivity.

4+ BHK - 3,600 sq. ft. to 3,600 sq. ft.

Living in Indiranagar - Local Insights for Tenants from NoBroker Database

Connectivity & Commute

Indiranagar has strong bus coverage which includes bus stops like Binnamangala (Towards ITC), Police Station Indiranagara, Indira Nagar Old Police Station Bus Stop, and metro stations like Swami Vivekananda Road, Indiranagar, Baiyappanahalli access. Indiranagar has good road connectivity, though peak-hour traffic should be considered.

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the types of bhk flats for rent in Indiranagar, Bangalore?

In Bangalore you’ll find many apartment for rent that have a variation of –
1 RK – 1 room and kitchen for rent in Indiranagar
1 BHK – 1 bedroom, hall and kitchen for rent in Indiranagar
2 BHK – 2 bedrooms, hall and kitchen for rent Indiranagar
3 BHK – 3 bedrooms, hall and kitchen for rent in Indiranagar
4 BHk - 4 bedroom, hall and kitchen for rent in Indiranagar
Villas - Independent Houses for rent in Indiranagar

If you are living alone, then a 1RK and 1BHK make the most sense. If you need space for an office at home, then you can even go for a 2BHK.

For those with families, a 2BHK or more is better, depending on the number of people in your family.

Nowadays, most builders have a 2.5 BHK (2-and-a-half-bedroom apartment) and so on. These half rooms are not as big as a regular bedroom and you can use this as a study/home office/ storage room and so on.

What are the different types of furniture options in an flat for rent in Indiranagar, Bangalore?

When you are talking about apartment furniture, there are three types –
Fully furnished
Semi-furnished
Unfurnished

In a fully furnished apartment for rent in Indiranagar, Bangalore everything is available. From TV cabinets, to beds and kitchen cabinets to cupboards, the apartment will have everything you need.

A semi-furnished apartment for rent in Indiranagar, Bangalore will have some essential furniture but not everything. You might find things such as built-in cupboards, light and fans available, but you will need to arrange for the other furniture you need like seating and tables etc.

In an unfurnished apartment for rent in Indiranagar, Bangalore, you will need to arrange for all the furniture yourself. This is a good option for those people who have purchased furniture and don’t want to sell it. If you love to do your own decor, then this is the best option for you.
